message:
docs(fcp): integrate APR round 3 revisions from GPT Pro 5.2

Major protocol improvements from round 3:

RFC2119 Conformance:
- Add RFC 2119/8174 conformance language section after Abstract
- Clarify MUST/SHOULD/MAY semantics for normative text

Security-Critical Fixes:
- Fix Provenance merge() to use MIN(integrity), MAX(confidentiality)
- Rename origin_integrity/confidentiality to integrity_label/confidentiality_label
- Add LabelAdjustment enum for proof-carrying label changes
- Add SanitizerReceipt for mechanically verifiable taint reductions
- Fix ApprovalToken::create() to use proper mesh object model

Type Safety Improvements:
- Replace f64 floats with basis points (u16/u32) in ObjectPlacementPolicy
- Add typed DeviceSelector enum to prevent implementation divergence
- Replace resource_uris with ResourceObject for zone-bound auditing

New Protocol Features:
- Add foreign_refs to ObjectHeader for cross-zone refs (no GC effect)
- Add FCPC control-plane framing using session k_ctx for invoke/response
- Add RevocationFreshnessPolicy for tiered offline behavior (Strict/Warn/BestEffort)
- Add KIDs (Key IDs) to MeshIdentity and NodeKeyAttestation for key rotation
- Add session rekey triggers: rekey_after_seconds, rekey_after_bytes

Conformance & Testing:
- Add Section 27.3 fuzzing requirements for reference implementation
- Define fuzz targets: FCPS parsing, handshake, CapabilityToken, ZoneKeyManifest

Editorial:
- Fix Section 10.3 Standard Methods table placement
- Add declassification output label rule documentation
- Fix manifest example to use network.egress capability format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
